Melbourne  ·  Garden Care Since 2021

Your garden, in the
hands it deserves.

Coltivato con cura.

Scroll

Heritage

Four generations of craft.

Leonardo grew up among the olive groves of southern Sicily, where his grandfather Rosario taught him to tend a garden the way a family tends a name — with patience, with specificity, and with a long view of what you are actually building.

Today the same craft is practised here in Melbourne, by the same small team, on the day we said we would.

Leonardo Qucco

Founder
Read our story

Gardens we have
the joy of tending.

A glimpse of the established Melbourne gardens in our care.

See more on Instagram

What We Do

Every garden has
a different story.
We know how to read them.

  • Scheduled Garden Maintenance

    Reliable, seasonally-tuned care that keeps your garden healthy and immaculate year-round — pruning, feeding, weeding and the watchful eye of people who know plants.

    Learn more

  • Garden Renovations

    Tired or overgrown spaces reimagined and rebuilt — thoughtful design, the right plants, and a garden that thrives for years to come.

    Learn more

  • Tree & Plant Pruning

    Precise, species-aware pruning that improves health, structure and form — from fruit trees to feature specimens.

    Learn more

  • Specialised Hedge Management

    Crisp, considered hedging — hand-sheared or machine-cut — for formal lines and lasting density.

    Learn more

  • Soft Landscaping & Planting

    Expert plant selection, design and planting that turns a garden into a living, balanced sanctuary.

    Learn more

  • Pest & Disease Control

    Eco-friendly, natural-first treatment that protects your plants and the beneficial life around them.

    Learn more

  • Instant Lawn & Turf

    Lush, resilient lawns properly prepared and laid — partnered with one of Australia's best turf suppliers, Lillydale Instant Lawn.

    Learn more

  • Pressure Cleaning

    Paths, patios and driveways restored — powerful, surface-safe cleaning that brings back the kerb appeal instantly.

    Learn more

  • Green-Waste & Rubbish Removal

    Fast, tidy, eco-conscious clearing of garden waste and bulky items — your space left clean and clutter-free.

    Learn more

Signature Service

Garden Makeovers & Pre-Sale Preparation

Auction-ready gardens that lift kerb appeal and sale price — we work with homeowners and agents from photography day to auction. From a single-day tidy to a full seasonal renewal, your garden will look its absolute best on the day that matters most.

Learn more

The Difference

See the transformation.

Real Melbourne gardens, before and after our team got to work. Drag the handle to reveal the change.

Heritage Courtyard

Before After

A tired heritage courtyard, brought back to life — fresh lawn, lifted canopies and a considered finish.

New-Build Front Garden

Before After

From bare ground to a crisp, established front garden — turf laid and beds planted for instant kerb appeal.

Ready to transform your garden?

Request a free site visit

The Team

A small team that
genuinely cares.

We're a close-knit, fully-equipped crew who turn up reliably, work with real skill, and treat your garden — and your home — with respect.

The same friendly faces, every visit. We notice when your camellias need attention, we remember the names of your trees, and we take pride in leaving every garden better than we found it.

Book a consultation

Get in touch

Let's grow something beautiful together.

Tell us a little about your garden and we'll be in touch to arrange a free, no-obligation quote.
